title: 20 Pcs Red and Green Christmas Holly Berries Faux Berry Flowers with Leaves Xmas Berry Picks Decoration,Beautiful Christmas Wreath Branches,ChristmaVase Fillers,Artificial Plants and Flowers
features: 😍😍😍Versatile Decoration: This set of 20 faux holly berry picks is perfect for adding festive touches to Christmas wreaths, garlands, vases, and other holiday decor.
😍😍😍Realistic Appearance: Featuring vibrant red berries and lush green leaves, these artificial plants and flowers provide a lifelike, natural look.
😍😍😍Long-Lasting: Made from high-quality materials, these berry picks will maintain their beauty for years without wilting or fading.
😍😍😍Easy to Use: Simply arrange these stems as desired to create beautiful, customized displays for your home or office.
😍😍😍Dimensions: Each berry pick measures approximately 7-9 inches in length, allowing for versatile arrangements.
description: Bring the beauty of nature into your home with these 20 pieces of faux holly berry picks. Featuring vibrant red berries and lush green leaves, these artificial plants and flowers are perfect for creating stunning Christmas wreaths, floral arrangements, and vase fillers. The realistic design captures the essence of the holiday season, while the durable construction ensures long-lasting enjoyment. These versatile picks can be woven into garlands, tucked into centerpieces, or used as accents throughout your home. With their festive colors and lifelike appearance, these holly berry picks will add a touch of warmth and cheer to your Christmas decor.
